name: GH_IReader
summary: Provides access to a subset of GH_Chunk methods used for reading archives.

methods.name: AddMessage
methods.summary: Log a new message with the top-level archive. Messages are collected during read/write operations, and can be displayed to the user upon completion using GH_Archive.ShowMessageLog().

methods.name: ChunkExists(String)
methods.summary: Checks whether a chunk with the specified name exists in the litter. Only chunks without index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to test for.

returns.doc: True if a chunk with the specified name exists, otherwise false.

methods.name: ChunkExists(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Checks whether a chunk with the specified name and index exists in the litter. Only chunks with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to test for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of chunk to test for. If less than zero, ChunkExists(string chunk_name) is called instead.

returns.doc: True if a chunk with the specified name and index exists, otherwise false.

methods.name: FindChunk(String)
methods.summary: Finds the first chunk in the litter that matches the given name. Only chunks without index qualifiers are considered.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to search for.

returns.doc: The child chunk that matches the given name, or null of no matching chunk could be found.

methods.name: FindChunk(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Finds the first chunk in the list that matches the given name and index. Only chunks with index qualifiers are considered.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of chunk to search for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of chunk to search for. If less than zero, FindChunk(string chunk_name) is called instead.

returns.doc: The child chunk that matches the given name and index, or null of no matching chunk could be found.

methods.name: FindItem(String)
methods.summary: Finds the first item that matches the given name. Only items without index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to search for.

returns.doc: The item that matches the given name, or null of no matching item could be found.

methods.name: FindItem(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Finds the first item that matches the given name and index. Only items with index qualifiers are considered. Name comparisons are not case-sensitive.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name of item to search for.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of item to search for. If less than zero, then FindItem(string name) is called instead.

returns.doc: The item that matches the given name and index, or null of no matching item could be found.

methods.name: GetBoolean(String)
methods.summary: Gets the value of the item with the specified name. Name comparison is not case-sensitive.

returns.doc: The inner value of the item.

throws.when: Thrown if the type conversion fails.
Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name does not exist.

methods.summary: Gets the value of the item with the specified name and index. Name comparison is not case-sensitive.

returns.doc: The inner value of the item.

throws.when: Thrown if the type conversion fails.
Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name and index does not exist.

methods.summary: Gets the value of the item with the specified name. Name comparison is not case-sensitive.

params.doc: Base path for relative path resolution.

returns.doc: An array of path strings. If the resolved relative path is different from the stored absolute path, two strings will be returned.

Thrown if the type conversion is invalid.
Thrown if the item with the specified name does not exist.

methods.name: Write(BinaryWriter)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to serialize itself.

params.name: writer
params.doc: Writer object to be used for serialization.

methods.name: Write(XmlWriter)
methods.summary: Called when an object is required to serialize itself.

params.name: writer
params.doc: Writer object to be used for serialization.

properties.name: Archive
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the archive that owns the Root of the tree this chunk belongs to.

properties.name: ArchiveLocation
properties.summary: Gets a string representing the URI with which the archive is associated. The location may be a null string.

properties.name: ChunkCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of child chunks contained in this chunk. The set of all child chunks is referred to as a 'litter'.

properties.name: Chunks
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of child chunks. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets the index of this chunk. The index is set by the owner of this chunk. Indices smaller than zero imply no index has been set. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in the same litter.

properties.name: ItemCount
properties.summary: Gets the number of items contained in this chunk.

properties.name: Items
properties.summary: Gets a pointer to the internal list of items. Do not access this list unless you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets the name of this chunk. The name is set by the owner of this chunk. Names must be at least 1 character long. The combination of name+index is always unique among a set of chunks in a single litter.
